name: cargo-bucket-deployment-prototype
description: Local prototype of a Rust-backed CDK bucket deployment construct

scripts.example:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/simple-app.js"
scripts.example:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/simple-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:destroy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/simple-app.js" --force
scripts.example:replacements:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/replacement-matrix-app.js"
scripts.example:replacements:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/replacement-matrix-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:replacements:destroy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/replacement-matrix-app.js" --force
scripts.example:cloudfront:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/cloudfront-invalidation-app.js"
scripts.example:cloudfront:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/cloudfront-invalidation-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:cloudfront:destroy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/cloudfront-invalidation-app.js" --force
scripts.example:cloudfront:async:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/cloudfront-invalidation-async-app.js"
scripts.example:cloudfront:async:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/cloudfront-invalidation-async-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:cloudfront:async:destroy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/cloudfront-invalidation-async-app.js" --force
scripts.example:controls:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/controls-matrix-app.js"
scripts.example:controls:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/controls-matrix-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:controls:destroy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/controls-matrix-app.js" --force
scripts.example:prune:v1:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/prune-cycle-v1-app.js"
scripts.example:prune:v1:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/prune-cycle-v1-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:prune:v2:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/prune-cycle-v2-app.js"
scripts.example:prune:v2:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/prune-cycle-v2-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:prune:destroy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/prune-cycle-v2-app.js" --force
scripts.example:retain:v1:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/retain-cycle-v1-app.js"
scripts.example:retain:v1:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/retain-cycle-v1-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:retain:v2:synth: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk synth --app "node dist/examples/retain-cycle-v2-app.js"
scripts.example:retain:v2:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk deploy --app "node dist/examples/retain-cycle-v2-app.js" --require-approval never
scripts.example:retain:destroy: pnpm build && pnpm exec cdk destroy --app "node dist/examples/retain-cycle-v2-app.js" --force
